creator: mgrooms@shrew.net
text:
This update fixes a bug that causes iked to close unexpectedly when a -p pidfile option is not specified on the command line.

Fix: Upgrade the port to 2.2.1
How-To-Repeat: 	Running iked from 2.2.0 distribution with no options will immediately exit. This newer version, 2.2.1, works as expected.
